hero.titleLine1: We develop websites and systems that help businesses save time

services.title: WHAT WE
services.subTitle: High-impact digital solutions. Flawless design, efficient code.

theme.title: Theme Development
theme.description: Tailor-made websites with React and Next.js, prioritizing performance and pixel-perfect Figma replicas.

custom.title: Custom Code
custom.description: Complex logical solutions, API integrations, and custom-built systems.

design.title: Interfaces that Convert
design.description: We design intuitive and attractive digital experiences that improve your product's usability.

cms.title: CMS Integration
cms.description: Dynamic content management with Strapi to give you total control over your texts and images.

ecommerce.title: E-commerce Solutions
ecommerce.description: Robust and secure online stores to scale your sales and manage payments digitally.

automation.title: Automation
automation.description: Appointment management with Calendly and automated workflows that save administrative time.

branding.title: Unforgettable Brand DNA
branding.description: Complete visual systems, from the logo to the brand manual, defining your brand's essence.

social.title: Visual & Social Strategy
social.description: Coherent identity and high-impact ads. We design social media that builds authority and multiplies your sales.

seo.title: Performance & SEO
seo.description: Deep technical optimization to make your site load instantly and scale in search engines.

projects.title: OUR
projects.subTitle: Explore a selection of our most recent work. From animated landing pages to complex systems.

method.title: OUR METHOD:
method.subTitle: Strategy, design, and development: step by step toward your digital success.

step1.title: 1 - Brand DNA
step1.desc: Before coding, we define your identity. We choose colors, typography, and a tone of voice that connects with your customers. We create a solid visual foundation that represents your business's essence and translates seamlessly across your social media.

step2.title: 2 - UX/UI Design in Figma
step2.desc: We create a navigable prototype in Figma. You'll see exactly how your site will look before we write a single line of code. Pixel-perfect replicas to ensure no surprises.

step3.title: 3 - Web Development (Next.js)
step3.desc: We translate the design into real code using React and Next.js. We focus on clean, semantic, and SEO-optimized code, ensuring fast and scalable loading.

step4.title: 4 - Self-Management with Strapi
step4.desc: We integrate Strapi CMS for total control. Easily change texts, images, or manage your blog without depending on us. A website that grows with you.
